name: monitor-ia-agent
description: Agente de escritorio para Monitor IA - recolecta métricas de herramientas IA locales

scripts.write-version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),v=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')).version;fs.writeFileSync('src/core/agent-version.ts','// Auto-generated by write-version script\nexport const AGENT_VERSION = '+JSON.stringify(v)+'\n');"
scripts.bundle: npm run write-version && esbuild src/cli/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=bundle/agent.cjs --format=cjs && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.wasm', 'bundle/sql-wasm.wasm')"
scripts.pkg:win: npx pkg bundle/agent.cjs --target node18-win-x64 --output releases/monitor-ia-agent-win.exe --compress GZip
scripts.pkg:linux: npx pkg bundle/agent.cjs --target node18-linux-x64 --output releases/monitor-ia-agent-linux --compress GZip
scripts.pkg:mac: npx pkg bundle/agent.cjs --target node18-macos-x64 --output releases/monitor-ia-agent-macos --compress GZip
scripts.pkg:all: npm run bundle && npm run pkg:win && npm run pkg:linux && npm run pkg:mac
scripts.electron:build: npm run electron:clean && npm run electron:write-cjs-marker && cross-env BUILD_BRAND=jakite npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:bundle:installer && npm run electron:bundle:app && npm run electron:copy-html && npm run electron:copy-brands
scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:build && cross-env BUILD_BRAND=jakite npx electron dist/electron/electron/main.js
scripts.electron:pack:win: npm run electron:build && cross-env BUILD_BRAND=jakite npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:mac: npm run electron:build && cross-env BUILD_BRAND=jakite npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:linux: npm run electron:build && cross-env BUILD_BRAND=jakite npx electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
